About & FAQ

TQ SDE Complements

Comparing Singularity_Previous (Build: 3246005) to Singularity_Next (Build: 3278441)

Want to be notified of new patches? Hop into #hoboleaks on Tweetfleet Slack! Instructions on how to join Tweetfleet Slack here.
Please note that Singularity will be kept inaccessible except for specific testing windows, and may fall significantly behind Tranquility in patches. The Tranquility/Singularity diff (homepage) may not be particularly useful for the time being. Refer to the latest Tranquility patches instead.

Find Hoboleaks useful and want to provide some support at no additional cost to yourself?
Use affiliate code HL (short for HoboLeaks) the next time you make a purchase through the official EVE store, which has Omega, PLEX, and much more. The small commission we receive helps Hoboleaks remain ad-free. Thank you! ♥

No errors - you shouldn't see this text.

92033 - Orbweaver SW-300-I The combat chassis of this light drone has been adapted to also house a webifier.

Its design is inhuman in origin, having been developed inside a Rogue Drone hive. Its link to the hive was never formed, and now it serves at the behest of the humans it was built to destroy.		 Combat Drone

92092 - Gallente Election Y128 SKINs Crate Includes one randomly selected SKIN: Exoplanets Hunter, Chromodynamic Candy, Luminaire Zenith, Industrial Livery, Hunter's Quiver, Inner Zone Shipping, Quafe Green Apple, or Green Demons.

All SKINs in this crate apply to Gallente hulls, except the Industrial Livery SKINs, which apply to industrial ships.		 Special Edition Commodities

92158 - Basic 'Demos' Cerebral Accelerator This cerebral accelerator has been produced by the Gallente Federation. When consumed by a capsuleer, this booster will increase the rate at which they train skills for a short time.

Volatile compounds were used to create this cerebral accelerator, limiting its shelf life. It will cease to function after April 23, YC128.		 Booster

industryBlueprintRank: 40.0
92183 - CONCORD-Carrier Rogue Analysis Beacon In response to the growing Rogue Drone outbreaks of YC128, CONCORD commissioned a Carrier specific version of the CONCORD Rogue Analysis Beacon (CRAB).

Unlike the original version, this one was able to mask drones and fighters from any incoming Rogue Drones. It also used a subtler, more thorough approach to signal analysis that resulted in less system interference.

NOTE: CRAB linking may not be possible if system signal interference is too high, or if the linking capsuleer has insufficient Complex Encryption Qubits (CEQ).

WARNING: Linking to this CRAB will render your ship immobile until the powering up phase is completed.

Ship Restrictions: linking and activation may only be performed by Carriers.		 Mobile Analysis Beacon
Click to toggle showing the 32 attributes. descriptionID: 1035721

92282 - Tenzin YC128 Campaign Bus A champion of humanity-first policies, Senator Lucas Tenzin ran for President in YC128. His grassroots campaign was unique in that it had no outside political party support or major corporate donors. A man of the people, Tenzin promised to fight for a unified Federation where everyone got their share of prosperity. Special Edition Yachts

92283 - Moreau YC128 Campaign Bus A radical thinker ready to fight for the freedom to explore any possibility, Governor Alix Moreau ran for President in YC128. They were unchained by the traditional limitations of what has been and ready to embrace what could be. Special Edition Yachts

92284 - Roden YC128 Campaign Bus A savvy business leader not afraid to make the tough decisions, Soraya Roden was the first to step into the Presidential race in YC128. With the baking of her family’s impressive legacy, she championed traditional values along with groundbreaking cooperation with private interests to build an unstoppable Federation. Special Edition Yachts

92371 - Veldspar 0-Grade Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> mineral.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 Veldspar

92372 - Compressed Veldspar 0-Grade Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> mineral.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Veldspar

92373 - Scordite 0-Grade Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It has a fair bit of <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>. Good choice for those starting their mining careers.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 Scordite

92451 - Tenzin’s Modified Guidance Disruptor Disrupts the effective range and precision of missiles fired by the target ship. This module can be loaded with scripts to increase its effectiveness in certain areas.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Weapon Disruptor

92453 - Moreau’s Modified Expanded Scan Probe Launcher Launcher for <a href=showinfo:30013>Core Scanner Probes</a> and <a href=showinfo:30028>Combat Scanner Probes</a>.

<a href=showinfo:30013>Core Scanner Probes</a> are used to scan down Cosmic Signatures in space.
<a href=showinfo:30028>Combat Scanner Probes</a> are used to scan down Cosmic Signatures, starships, structures and drones.

Note: Only one scan probe launcher can be fitted per ship.

15% bonus to strength of scan probes.		 Scan Probe Launcher
Click to toggle showing the 35 attributes. descriptionID: 1036675

92454 - Roden’s Modified Nanofiber Internal Structure Replaces some of the heavier structure components with lighter, but more fragile material. Increases ship's velocity and improves maneuverability at the expense of hull strength.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Nanofiber Internal Structure

92455 - Presidential Information Command Burst An advanced form of Information Command Burst, this module can be loaded with a variety of Information Command Burst Charges to project a field of beneficial nanites over fleet members, improving their sensor and electronic warfare capabilities.

+25% bonus to the effect strength of Information Command Burst charges launched from this module.		 Command Burst

92461 - Skimmer TP-300-I The combat chassis of this light drone has been adapted to also house a target painter.

Its design is inhuman in origin, having been developed inside a Rogue Drone hive. Its link to the hive was never formed, and now it serves at the behest of the humans it was built to destroy.		 Combat Drone

92514 - Ultratidal Entropic Disintegrator II This extra-large Entropic Disintegrator is only seen in use on Triglavian capital ships, these massive ships being capable of managing the considerable radiation and enormous gravitational tidal forces the weapon generates. At the energy levels of this ultraheavy weapon system, the tidal forces are so powerful that even the special systems built into battleships are insufficient and only capital ships can deal with the forces involved.

Entropic Disintegrators draw on the tremendous power of the Triglavian singularity-based energy systems to convert exotic matter into a particle stream directed with locally generated entropic force. While powerful, the range of the weapon is limited by the attenuation of entropic forces, which dissipate critically beyond the optimal range. As a result this weapon has no falloff range.

The particle stream generates thermal and explosive reactions on impact, and the entropic forces resolve into a localized gravitational conduit that steadily increases the acceleration on the exotic particles. In effect, the weapon's damage potential increases to a maximum level as long as the particle stream is kept on the same target.

Requires either standard or advanced exotic plasma charge ammo types: Baryon, Meson, Tetryon, Mystic, and Occult.		 Precursor Weapon

92550 - Tenzin’s Gallente Background A background for capsuleer portraits featuring the proud symbol of the Gallente Federation. It was commissioned by the campaign to elect Lucas Tenzin for president in YC128.

This can be consumed when updating your portrait if it is in an accessible inventory location.		 Portrait Backgrounds

92573 - Federation Ascent - Limited A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license.		 Ship SKIN Design Element
Click to toggle showing the 14 attributes. descriptionID: 1037377

92574 - Federation Ascent - Unlimited A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide <a href=showinfo:81348>Alignment Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing. The digital sequence of this metallic nanocoating has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this metallic you must provide <a href=showinfo:81349>Fermionic Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 Ship SKIN Design Element

92631 - Women's Select Freedom Combat Suit In these violent and chaotic times, the sanctity of elections is more important than ever. As of YC128, all election officials will now be equipped with special edition Select Freedom Combat Suits developed by Duvolle Industries. These suits will ensure their ability to protect the Gallente people’s most precious asset, their votes.

- Agenbaert Goisin, Head of the Federal Administration.		 Outer
Click to toggle showing the 14 attributes. descriptionID: 1038324
typeID: 92631
Capacity: 0.0
typeNameID: 1037572
iconID: 27383
basePrice: 0.0
metaGroupID: 17
marketGroupID: 1405 (Outerwear)
Volume: 0.1
radius: 1.0
published: 1
Mass: 0.5
groupID: 1088
portionSize: 1
92633 - Nanoswarm Suspension This device contains a nanobot swarm (or nanoswarm), suspended within a solution. They were created to support the Fabricator in its manufacturing processes.

Once primed for use, the device can be destroyed, unleashing the nanoswarm on the surrounding environment, where they will apply a specific effect. If another device is destroyed first, or they are allowed to expire, the nanoswarm will become inert.		 Irregular Structure

92661 - Cheetah Zydrine Burn SKIN Zydrine Burn is a potent liquor that is loosely related to the more refined Zydrine Wine, both of these green-hued drinks being produced using rice leaves, a certain portion of the grains, and whatever additives are appropriate to the style of drink. While Zydrine Wine can be an extraordinarily delicate and subtle drink, with the finest generally held to be brewed from the rice plants of Intaki Prime, its more powerful cousin is a somewhat pungent and vividly green brew. Rumors suggest that some versions of Zydrine Burn use as ingredients effluent from Quafe production, liquefied fedo scent glands, or even the notorious protein delicacies in powdered form. Whatever the case, a market for this harshly memorable liquor has sprung up among space workers of all kinds, and few space station bars lack a bottle or two of the stuff. Among planetary populations the brew has a more notorious reputation, popularly considered the tipple of underclasses, criminals, and ruthless capsuleer pirates. Permanent SKIN
Click to toggle showing the 25 attributes. descriptionID: 1037700

While Zydrine Wine can be an extraordinarily delicate and subtle drink, with the finest generally held to be brewed from the rice plants of Intaki Prime, its more powerful cousin is a somewhat pungent and vividly green brew. Rumors suggest that some versions of Zydrine Burn use as ingredients effluent from Quafe production, liquefied fedo scent glands, or even the notorious protein delicacies in powdered form. 92668 - Discovery Bound SKIN “Participation in Project Discovery is a vital reminder that the endless, war-torn expanse of New Eden is not without compassion. It is rife with empathetic pilots who understand the power of scientific research. Only through our combined efforts do we overcome the obstacles before us.”

- CONCORD Director General Panaja Paukonsuo		 Permanent SKIN

92952 - Mystic XL An Entropic Disintegrator uses charges of exotic plasma to provide the particle feedstock for the weapon's beam, with different forms of exotic matter modulating the beam's characteristics.

An experimental exotic plasma charge developed using advanced technology in conjunction with Precursor weapons tech, the Mystic charge achieves high thermal damage potential at longer ranges than would normally be possible.

However, explosive damage remains low and there is a serious loss in the stability of the disintegrator beam. This instability reduces the tracking of weapons using Mystic Exotic Plasma charges.		 Advanced Exotic Plasma Charge
Click to toggle showing the 35 attributes. descriptionID: 1038629
typeID: 92952
graphicID: 1141
Capacity: 0.0
metaLevel: 5
isDynamicType: 0

92954 - Occult XL An Entropic Disintegrator uses charges of exotic plasma to provide the particle feedstock for the weapon's beam, with different forms of exotic matter modulating the beam's characteristics.

An experimental exotic plasma charge developed using advanced technology in conjunction with Precursor weapons tech, the Occult charge achieves heavy thermal and explosive damage potential.

This high damage comes at the expense of range and significant loss in the stability of the disintegrator beam. This instability reduces the tracking of weapons using Occult Exotic Plasma charges.		 Advanced Exotic Plasma Charge

92958 - Gallente Election Expert System <font size="14">Gallente Election Expert System </font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly Gallente Tech 1 and Navy frigate-type, destroyer-type and cruiser-type ships along with Gallente-focused supporting skills. This is a promotional Expert System released to celebrate the Federation Day.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for four days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 Promotional Expert Systems

groupID: 4098
portionSize: 1
92963 - Worm Cryptic Ecdysis SKIN The algorithmic output of rogue drone intelligence renders them capable of complex calculations at rates far exceeding the limitations of current augmentation technology. They have been observed swarming fleets, stripping ships of vital components, and reconfiguring them mid flight. While the phenomenon is evocative of a metal snake shedding its skin, the potential for scientific application is staggering.

- Excerpts from Alix Moreau’s research		 Permanent SKIN

93069 - Enyo Pride of the Federation SKIN A joint effort by Gallente ship manufacturers and other commercial entities, these SKINs were created to celebrate the long-overdue Gallente elections of YC128. Brands from all across the Federation have come together to encourage participation in the democratic process, irrespective of which candidate citizens support. Permanent SKIN

93270 - Historic Carrier SKINs Crate This crate grants one random Carrier ship SKIN from the following SKIN lines: Dos Rouvenor's Bequest, Kairiola's Sacrifice, Caille Neon, Federal Police, Eros Blossom, Crown and Swords, Imperial Jubilee, Ironblood, Star Captain, Matigu Seabeast, Raata Sunset, Ghostbird, Freedom's Revolution, Bloody Hands, Krusual and Malagrin Marshlight.

With 16 SKINs available, each crate has a 6.25% chance to contain a specific SKIN.		 Special Edition Commodities

22428 - Redeemer
(Black Ops)		 Black Ops bonuses (per skill level):
  • 7.5% bonus to Large Energy Turret tracking speed
  • 10% bonus to Energy Nosferatu and Energy Neutralizer drain amount


Amarr Battleship bonuses (per skill level):
  • 10% reduction in Large Energy Turret activation cost
  • 10% bonus to Large Energy Turret rate of fire


Role Bonus:
  • Can fit Cynosural Field Generator, Covert Cynosural Field Generator, and Covert Jump Portal Generator modules

  • Cloak reactivation delay reduced to 5 seconds
  • 75% reduction to effective distance traveled for jump fatigue

  • 650% bonus to ship max velocity when using Cloaking Devices
  • 100% bonus to Shield Extender hitpoints
  • 50% bonus to Armor Plate hitpoints
  • 5% additional bonus to Reinforced Bulkhead hitpoints

532756 Large asteroid environment Asteroid Set 1 Large 3 Abyssal Large aAsteroid environmentSet 1 Large 3 Abyssal Name of item 47414 (Non-Interactable Object)
537237 This large Entropic Disintegrator is only seen in use on Triglavian battleships, these massive ships being capable of managing the considerable radiation and enormous gravitational tidal forces the weapon generates. At the energy levels of this superheavy weapon system, the tidal forces are such that special systems are built into the ship to counteract them.

Entropic Disintegrators draw on the tremendous power of the Triglavian singularity-based energy systems to convert exotic matter into a particle stream directed with locally generated entropic force. While powerful, the range of the weapon is limited by the attenuation of entropic forces, which dissipate critically beyond the optimal range. As a result this weapon has no falloff range.

The particle stream generates thermal and explosive reactions on impact, and the entropic forces resolve into a localized gravitational conduit that steadily increases the acceleration on the exotic particles. In effect, the weapon's damage potential increases to a maximum level as long as the particle stream is kept on the same target.

Requires exotic plasma charge ammo types: Baryon, Meson, and Tetryon.		 This large Entropic Disintegrator is only seen in use on Triglavian battleships, these massive ships being capable of managing the considerable radiation and enormous gravitational tidal forces the weapon generates. At the energy levels of this superheavy weapon system, the tidal forces are such that special systems are built into the ship to counteract them.

Entropic Disintegrators draw on the tremendous power of the Triglavian singularity-based energy systems to convert exotic matter into a particle stream directed with locally generated entropic force. While powerful, the range of the weapon is limited by the attenuation of entropic forces, which dissipate critically beyond the optimal range. As a result this weapon has no falloff range.

The particle stream generates thermal and explosive reactions on impact, and the entropic forces resolve into a localized gravitational conduit that steadily increases the acceleration on the exotic particles. In effect, the weapon's damage potential increases to a maximum level as long as the particle stream is kept on the same target.

Requires either standard or advanced exotic plasma charge ammo types: Baryon, Meson, Tetryon, Mystic, and Occult.		 This large Entropic Disintegrator is only seen in use on Triglavian battleships, these massive ships being capable of managing the considerable radiation and enormous gravitational tidal forces the weapon generates. At the energy levels of this superheavy weapon system, the tidal forces are such that special systems are built into the ship to counteract them.

Entropic Disintegrators draw on the tremendous power of the Triglavian singularity-based energy systems to convert exotic matter into a particle stream directed with locally generated entropic force. While powerful, the range of the weapon is limited by the attenuation of entropic forces, which dissipate critically beyond the optimal range. As a result this weapon has no falloff range.

The particle stream generates thermal and explosive reactions on impact, and the entropic forces resolve into a localized gravitational conduit that steadily increases the acceleration on the exotic particles. In effect, the weapon's damage potential increases to a maximum level as long as the particle stream is kept on the same target.

Requires either standard or advanced exotic plasma charge ammo types: Baryon, Meson, and Tetryon, Mystic, and Occult.		 Description of item "Supratidal Entropic Disintegrator II" (47922)
549958 To enlist for Factional Warfare you need to be in a station with a militia office. After you docked you can click on the Factional Warfare icon and then click enlist.

You can either enlist solo, or you can enlist your corporation, or alliance.

Solo: You can enlist with any Faction, as long as your base standings are above 0.0. You will be required to leave your current corporation to join one of the militias.		 To enlist for Factional Warfare you need to be in a station with a militia office. After you docked you can click on the Factional Warfare icon and then click enlist.

You can either enlist solo, or you can enlist your corporation, or alliance.

Solo: You can directly enlist with any Faction, as long as your base standings are above 0.0.		 To enlist for Factional Warfare you need to be in a station with a militia office. After you docked you can click on the Factional Warfare icon and then click enlist.

You can either enlist solo, or you can enlist your corporation, or alliance.

<b>Solo:</b> You can directly enlist with any Faction, as long as your base standings are above 0.0. You will be required to leave your current corporation to join one of the militias.		 UI/Agency/Tooltips/Encounters/FactionWarfare/SoloEnlistment

583335 During the Crimson Harvest the Blood Raider cultist pirates will be clashing with the fundamentalist holy warriors of the Order of Tetrimon across New Eden. Choose a side to support and you will receive agency challenges with additional rewards every time you attack or hack the sites belonging to your side's enemies. 610201 <url=showinfo:5//30004967>Luminaire</url>: Southwestern Route Extra Lap
Enter the Federation Grand Prix Start Line
You are about to embark on our Southwestern Route in the Federation Grand Prix for an extra lap. This lap will count as timed and the top 10 fastest competitors to finish the route will have their name and legacy enshrined on a monument. Good luck!		 <url=showinfo:5//30004967>Luminaire</url>: Campaign Trail Extra Lap
Warp to the Campaign Trail Starting Line
You are about to embark on the Presidential Campaign Trail. Beware that this includes low security systems, with optional shortcuts through nullsec space. The shortest route is 142 jumps.		 <b><url=showinfo:5//30004967>Luminaire</url>: Southwestern Route Extra Lap</b>
Enter the FederatioCampaign Trail Extra Lap</b>

610203 Grand Prix Start Line Campaign Trail Start Grand PrixCampaign Trail Start Line
610204 <url=showinfo:5//30004967>Luminaire</url>: Starting Line Southwestern Route
Enter the Federation Grand Prix Start Line
You are about to embark on our Southwestern Route in the Federation Grand Prix, sponsored by the Duvolle Laboratories. Beware that the Southwestern Route waypoints include low security systems, and shortcuts through nullsec space are optional. This route is 142 jumps along the shortest route. Recommended ships are the following: Frigate or Interceptor. Be aware that the Federation Grand Prix does not take responsibility for any and all losses on your journey.		 <url=showinfo:5//30004967>Luminaire</url>: Campaign Trail Starting Line

610249 <url=showinfo:5//30003048>Carirgnottin</url>: Duvolle HQ Waypoint
Warp to the Federation Grand Prix Duvolle HQ Waypoint
Duvolle Labs manufactures sturdy ships with a good mix of offensive and defensive capabilities. Since the company is one of New Eden's foremost manufacturers of particle blasters, its ships tend to favor turrets and thus have somewhat higher power output than normal.		 <url=showinfo:5//30003048>Carirgnottin</url>: Duvolle HQ Waypoint

725894 Captain, beyond that gate lies a Vigilance Spire under the control of Tyrannos Tekton. It is only vulnerable when actively calling in hostiles to destroy you.

I recommend you damage the Breacher when you can and do your best to survive when you cannot.		 Captain, beyond that gate lies a Vigilance Spire under the control of Tyrannos Tekton. It is only vulnerable when actively calling in hostiles to destroy you.

I recommend you damage the Spire when you can and do your best to survive when you cannot.		 Captain, beyond that gate lies a Vigilance Spire under the control of Tyrannos Tekton. It is only vulnerable when actively calling in hostiles to destroy you.

I recommend you damage the BreacherSpire when you can and do your best to survive when you cannot.		 Part of conversation "Horizon Siege Point - Enter - Lobby - Default"

1034164 Damn, you did it! Outlasted those damn bots, now the Fabricator is a sitting duck.

Blow it open, and claim the maximum output this machine could dump.		 Damn, you did it! Outlasted those damn bots, now the Fabricator is a sitting duck.

Blow it open, and claim the maximum output this machine could dump.		 Part of conversation "Horde Mode - Event - Wave Limit Reached"
1034165 That Fabricator is producing escalating waves of Rogue Drones, but every time it resets, it dumps valuable assets. Stray too far, and it will deactivate. Don’t let that happen.

Survive its attacks as long as you can, then destroy it to claim its contents.		 That Fabricator is producing escalating waves of Rogue Drones, but every time it resets, it dumps valuable assets. Stray too far, and it will deactivate. Don’t let that happen.

Survive its attacks as long as you can, then destroy it to claim its contents.		 Part of conversation "Horde Mode - Enter - Default"
1034166 The battle here is over, but there are more Rampant Fabricators out there causing trouble. I hope we can count on you. The battle here is over, but there are more Rampant Fabricators out there causing trouble. I hope we can count on you. Part of conversation "Horde Mode - Enter - Complete"
1034167 The Fabricator has deactivated due to a lack of threat detection. The Fabricator has deactivated due to a lack of threat detection. Part of conversation "Horde Mode - Event - Failure - Abandoned"
1034168 That Fabricator is down for the count. Open it up to recover whatever was produced.

No shame in surviving, maybe next time you’ll be able to go the distance.		 That Fabricator is down for the count. Open it up to recover whatever was produced.

No shame in surviving, maybe next time you’ll be able to go the distance.		 Part of conversation "Horde Mode - Event - Failure - Resigned"

1035261 Orbweaver SW-300-I Orbweaver SW-300-I Name of item 92033 (Combat Drone)
1035262 The combat chassis of this light drone has been adapted to also house a webifier.

Its design is inhuman in origin, having been developed inside a Rogue Drone hive. Its link to the hive was never formed, and now it serves at the behest of the humans it was built to destroy.		 The combat chassis of this light drone has been adapted to also house a webifier.

Its design is inhuman in origin, having been developed inside a Rogue Drone hive. Its link to the hive was never formed, and now it serves at the behest of the humans it was built to destroy.		 Description of item "Orbweaver SW-300-I" (92033)

1035652 Basic 'Demos' Cerebral Accelerator Basic 'Demos' Cerebral Accelerator Name of item 92158 (Booster)
1035653 This cerebral accelerator has been produced by the Gallente Federation. When consumed by a capsuleer, this booster will increase the rate at which they train skills for a short time.

Volatile compounds were used to create this cerebral accelerator, limiting its shelf life. It will cease to function after April 23, YC128. 1035712 bonus to all shield resistances bonus to all shield resistances Trait for item "Loggerhead" (45645)
1035719 CONCORD-Carrier Rogue Analysis Beacon Blueprint CONCORD-Carrier Rogue Analysis Beacon Blueprint Name of item 92182 (Mobile Analysis Beacon Blueprint)
1035720 CONCORD-Carrier Rogue Analysis Beacon CONCORD-Carrier Rogue Analysis Beacon Name of item 92183 (Mobile Analysis Beacon)
1035721 In response to the growing Rogue Drone outbreaks of YC128, CONCORD commissioned a Carrier specific version of the CONCORD Rogue Analysis Beacon (CRAB).

Unlike the original version, this one was able to mask drones and fighters from any incoming Rogue Drones. It also used a subtler, more thorough approach to signal analysis that resulted in less system interference.

NOTE: CRAB linking may not be possible if system signal interference is too high, or if the linking capsuleer has insufficient Complex Encryption Qubits (CEQ).

WARNING: Linking to this CRAB will render your ship immobile until the powering up phase is completed.

Ship Restrictions: linking and activation may only be performed by Carriers.		 In response to the growing Rogue Drone outbreaks of YC128, CONCORD commissioned a Carrier specific version of the CONCORD Rogue Analysis Beacon (CRAB).

Unlike the original version, this one was able to mask drones and fighters from any incoming Rogue Drones. It also used a subtler, more thorough approach to signal analysis that resulted in less system interference.

<i>NOTE: CRAB linking may not be possible if system signal interference is too high, or if the linking capsuleer has insufficient Complex Encryption Qubits (CEQ).</i>

<b>WARNING: Linking to this CRAB will render your ship immobile until the powering up phase is completed.</b>

<i>Ship Restrictions: linking and activation may only be performed by <b>Carriers.</b></i>		 Description of item "CONCORD-Carrier Rogue Analysis Beacon" (92183)
1035893 Gallente Election System Wide Effects Gallente Election System Wide Effects Name for dungeon 13979

1035899 Hybrid Turret Tracking Speed Bonus Hybrid Turret Tracking Speed Bonus
1035900 Armor Repair Bonus Armor Repair Bonus
1035901 Drone Hit Points Bonus Drone Hit Points Bonus
1035902 A fabricator that, once triggered, manufactures increasingly dangerous Rogue Drones. A fabricator that, once triggered, manufactures increasingly dangerous Rogue Drones.
1035903 Once triggered, this infested fabricator will produce ever deadlier batches of Rogue Drones until it is depleted, destroyed, or it no longer detects a threat.
<color=#7fffffff>Time to complete:</color> Approximately 40-60 minutes.
<color=#7fffffff>Hostiles:</color> Rogue Drones

Fleet Recommendations:
<color=#7fffffff>Size:</color> 1-5 pilots.
<color=#7fffffff>Roles:</color> Enforcer

Restrictions:
<color=#7fffffff>Ships:</color> The Fabricator will engage with combat ships from Frigates up to Battleships in size.
<color=#7fffffff>Modules:</color> Smart Bombs and Micro Jump Field Generators are blocked while the Fabricator remains operational.		 Once triggered, this infested fabricator will produce ever deadlier batches of Rogue Drones until it is depleted, destroyed, or it no longer detects a threat.
<color=#7fffffff>Time to complete:</color> Approximately 40-60 minutes.
<color=#7fffffff>Hostiles:</color> Rogue Drones

Fleet Recommendations:
<color=#7fffffff>Size:</color> 1-5 pilots.
<color=#7fffffff>Roles:</color> Enforcer

Restrictions:
<color=#7fffffff>Ships:</color> The Fabricator will engage with combat ships from Frigates up to Battleships in size.
<color=#7fffffff>Modules:</color> Smart Bombs and Micro Jump Field Generators are blocked while the Fabricator remains operational.

1035909 This drone fabricator has been infested by an out-of-control rogue drone mind. Once it detects a threat, it will produce a defensive swarm that will continue to grow until all threats are eliminated or its systems overload. This drone fabricator has been infested by an out-of-control rogue drone mind. Once it detects a threat, it will produce a defensive swarm that will continue to grow until all threats are eliminated or its systems overload. Description of item "Rampant Fabricator" (91774)
1035910 The Fabricator is vulnerable. Destroy it now to end the site and claim the contents, or risk the next wave of hostiles to see if you can earn even more. The Fabricator is vulnerable. Destroy it now to end the site and claim the contents, or risk the next wave of hostiles to see if you can earn even more. UI/Objectives/Descriptions/hordeModeCooldownTooltip
1035911 Each wave survived adds additional items to the Fabricator. Destroy the Fabricator to claim its contents.

A permitted ship must remain within range to maintain stability; the Fabricator will become invulnerable if stability reaches 0.		 Each wave survived adds additional items to the Fabricator. Destroy the Fabricator to claim its contents.

A permitted ship must remain within range to maintain stability; the Fabricator will become invulnerable if stability reaches 0.		 UI/Objectives/Descriptions/hordeModeWaveCounterTooltip
1035912 Destroy Fabricator Destroy Fabricator UI/Objectives/Titles/hordeModeSuccess
1035946 This former industrial depot has been converted into a data stockpile by Rogue Drones. This former industrial depot has been converted into a data stockpile by Rogue Drones.
1035961 Our time, our Federation. Our time, our Federation.
1035962 Tenzin YC128 Campaign Bus Tenzin YC128 Campaign Bus Name of item 92282 (Special Edition Yachts)
1035963 Lucas Tenzin, YC128 Campaign Slogan Lucas Tenzin, YC128 Campaign Slogan
1035964 A champion of humanity-first policies, Senator Lucas Tenzin ran for President in YC128. His grassroots campaign was unique in that it had no outside political party support or major corporate donors. A man of the people, Tenzin promised to fight for a unified Federation where everyone got their share of prosperity. A champion of humanity-first policies, Senator Lucas Tenzin ran for President in YC128. His grassroots campaign was unique in that it had no outside political party support or major corporate donors. A man of the people, Tenzin promised to fight for a unified Federation where everyone got their share of prosperity. Description of item "Tenzin YC128 Campaign Bus" (92282)
1035965 A future without limits. A future without limits.
1035966 Moreau YC128 Campaign Bus Moreau YC128 Campaign Bus Name of item 92283 (Special Edition Yachts)
1035967 Alix Moreau, YC128 Campaign Slogan Alix Moreau, YC128 Campaign Slogan
1035968 A radical thinker ready to fight for the freedom to explore any possibility, Governor Alix Moreau ran for President in YC128. They were unchained by the traditional limitations of what has been and ready to embrace what could be. A radical thinker ready to fight for the freedom to explore any possibility, Governor Alix Moreau ran for President in YC128. They were unchained by the traditional limitations of what has been and ready to embrace what could be. Description of item "Moreau YC128 Campaign Bus" (92283)
1035969 A return to strength. A return to strength.
1035970 Roden YC128 Campaign Bus Roden YC128 Campaign Bus Name of item 92284 (Special Edition Yachts)
1035971 Soraya Roden, YC128 Campaign Slogan Soraya Roden, YC128 Campaign Slogan
1035972 A savvy business leader not afraid to make the tough decisions, Soraya Roden was the first to step into the Presidential race in YC128. With the baking of her family’s impressive legacy, she championed traditional values along with groundbreaking cooperation with private interests to build an unstoppable Federation. A savvy business leader not afraid to make the tough decisions, Soraya Roden was the first to step into the Presidential race in YC128. With the baking of her family’s impressive legacy, she championed traditional values along with groundbreaking cooperation with private interests to build an unstoppable Federation. Description of item "Roden YC128 Campaign Bus" (92284)

1036002 OUR TIME, OUR FEDERATION

Support Lucas Tenzin in his presidential bid by completing challenges in his name.		 OUR TIME, OUR FEDERATION

Support Lucas Tenzin in his presidential bid by completing challenges in his name.
1036003 OUR TIME, OUR FEDERATION

Lucas Tenzin needs you to help raise his profile. Complete challenges in his name and earn rewards.

Tiered Challenge Rewards
Supporter: 50 points, 10 x Political Favors.
Volunteer: 75 points, 15 x Political Favors.
Contributor: 100 points, 20 x Political Favors.
Benefactor: 125 points, 30 x Political Favors.
Lobbyist: 150 points, 1 x Presidential Candidate Favor.

*Trading challenges do not award Political Favors.

Campaign Trail Challenges
Total rewards for completing route: 250 points, 75 x Political Favors, 1 x Presidential Candidate Favor.		 OUR TIME, OUR FEDERATION

1036171 Veldspar 0-Grade Veldspar 0-Grade Name of item 92371 (Veldspar)
1036172 Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used Tritanium mineral.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> mineral.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 Description of item "Veldspar 0-Grade" (92371)
1036173 Compressed Veldspar 0-Grade Compressed Veldspar 0-Grade Name of item 92372 (Veldspar)
1036174 Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used Tritanium mineral.

This material is compressed and a much more compact form of the original material.		 Veldspar is the most common ore type in the central regions of known universe. It is still in constant demand as it holds a large portion of the much-used <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> mineral.

1036179 Scordite 0-Grade Scordite 0-Grade Name of item 92373 (Scordite)
1036180 Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It has a fair bit of Tritanium and Pyerite. Good choice for those starting their mining careers.

Available primarily in high security status star systems.		 Scordite is amongst the most common ore types in the central regions of known universe. It has a fair bit of <a href=showinfo:34>Tritanium</a> and <a href=showinfo:35>Pyerite</a>. Good choice for those starting their mining careers.

1036667 Tenzin’s Modified Guidance Disruptor Tenzin’s Modified Guidance Disruptor Name of item 92451 (Weapon Disruptor)
1036668 Disrupts the effective range and precision of missiles fired by the target ship. This module can be loaded with scripts to increase its effectiveness in certain areas.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Disrupts the effective range and precision of missiles fired by the target ship. This module can be loaded with scripts to increase its effectiveness in certain areas.

1036674 Moreau’s Modified Expanded Scan Probe Launcher Moreau’s Modified Expanded Scan Probe Launcher Name of item 92453 (Scan Probe Launcher)
1036675 Launcher for Core Scanner Probes and Combat Scanner Probes.

Core Scanner Probes are used to scan down Cosmic Signatures in space.
Combat Scanner Probes are used to scan down Cosmic Signatures, starships, structures and drones.

Note: Only one scan probe launcher can be fitted per ship.

15% bonus to strength of scan probes.		 Launcher for <a href=showinfo:30013>Core Scanner Probes</a> and <a href=showinfo:30028>Combat Scanner Probes</a>.

<a href=showinfo:30013>Core Scanner Probes</a> are used to scan down Cosmic Signatures in space.
<a href=showinfo:30028>Combat Scanner Probes</a> are used to scan down Cosmic Signatures, starships, structures and drones.

Note: Only one scan probe launcher can be fitted per ship.

15% bonus to strength of scan probes.		 Description of item "Moreau’s Modified Expanded Scan Probe Launcher" (92453)
1036677 Roden’s Modified Nanofiber Internal Structure Roden’s Modified Nanofiber Internal Structure Name of item 92454 (Nanofiber Internal Structure)
1036678 Replaces some of the heavier structure components with lighter, but more fragile material. Increases ship's velocity and improves maneuverability at the expense of hull strength.

Penalty: Using more than one type of this module or similar modules that affect the same attribute on the ship will be penalized.		 Replaces some of the heavier structure components with lighter, but more fragile material. Increases ship's velocity and improves maneuverability at the expense of hull strength.

1036679 Presidential Information Command Burst Presidential Information Command Burst Name of item 92455 (Command Burst)
1036680 An advanced form of Information Command Burst, this module can be loaded with a variety of Information Command Burst Charges to project a field of beneficial nanites over fleet members, improving their sensor and electronic warfare capabilities.

+25% bonus to the effect strength of Information Command Burst charges launched from this module. 1036764 Skimmer TP-300-I Skimmer TP-300-I Name of item 92461 (Combat Drone)
1036765 The combat chassis of this light drone has been adapted to also house a target painter.

Its design is inhuman in origin, having been developed inside a Rogue Drone hive. Its link to the hive was never formed, and now it serves at the behest of the humans it was built to destroy.		 The combat chassis of this light drone has been adapted to also house a target painter.

1037134 Ultratidal Entropic Disintegrator II Ultratidal Entropic Disintegrator II Name of item 92514 (Precursor Weapon)
1037135 This extra-large Entropic Disintegrator is only seen in use on Triglavian capital ships, these massive ships being capable of managing the considerable radiation and enormous gravitational tidal forces the weapon generates. At the energy levels of this ultraheavy weapon system, the tidal forces are so powerful that even the special systems built into battleships are insufficient and only capital ships can deal with the forces involved.

Entropic Disintegrators draw on the tremendous power of the Triglavian singularity-based energy systems to convert exotic matter into a particle stream directed with locally generated entropic force. While powerful, the range of the weapon is limited by the attenuation of entropic forces, which dissipate critically beyond the optimal range. As a result this weapon has no falloff range.

The particle stream generates thermal and explosive reactions on impact, and the entropic forces resolve into a localized gravitational conduit that steadily increases the acceleration on the exotic particles. In effect, the weapon's damage potential increases to a maximum level as long as the particle stream is kept on the same target.

Requires either standard or advanced exotic plasma charge ammo types: Baryon, Meson, Tetryon, Mystic, and Occult.		 This extra-large Entropic Disintegrator is only seen in use on Triglavian capital ships, these massive ships being capable of managing the considerable radiation and enormous gravitational tidal forces the weapon generates. At the energy levels of this ultraheavy weapon system, the tidal forces are so powerful that even the special systems built into battleships are insufficient and only capital ships can deal with the forces involved.

Entropic Disintegrators draw on the tremendous power of the Triglavian singularity-based energy systems to convert exotic matter into a particle stream directed with locally generated entropic force. While powerful, the range of the weapon is limited by the attenuation of entropic forces, which dissipate critically beyond the optimal range. As a result this weapon has no falloff range.

The particle stream generates thermal and explosive reactions on impact, and the entropic forces resolve into a localized gravitational conduit that steadily increases the acceleration on the exotic particles. In effect, the weapon's damage potential increases to a maximum level as long as the particle stream is kept on the same target.

Requires either standard or advanced exotic plasma charge ammo types: Baryon, Meson, Tetryon, Mystic, and Occult.		 Description of item "Ultratidal Entropic Disintegrator II" (92514)

1037374 Federation Ascent Federation Ascent
1037376 Federation Ascent - Limited Federation Ascent - Limited Name of item 92573 (Ship SKIN Design Element)
1037377 A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license.		 A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license.		 Description of item "Federation Ascent - Limited" (92573)
1037378 Federation Ascent - Unlimited Federation Ascent - Unlimited Name of item 92574 (Ship SKIN Design Element)
1037379 A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide Alignment Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide <a href=showinfo:81348>Alignment Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 Description of item "Federation Ascent - Unlimited" (92574)

1037389 A license for the unlimited use of a basic nanocoating in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

However, every time you sequence a design using this nanocoating you must provide Kerr Sequencer to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 A license for the unlimited use of a basic nanocoating in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this nanocoating has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this nanocoating you must provide <a href=showinfo:81350>Kerr Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing.		 Description of item "Verdigris Referendum Gloss - Unlimited" (92578)

1037567 A background for capsuleer portraits featuring the proud symbol of the Gallente Federation. It was commissioned by the campaign to elect Alix Moreau for president in YC128.

This can be consumed when updating your portrait if it is in an accessible inventory location.		 A background for capsuleer portraits featuring the proud symbol of the Gallente Federation. It was commissioned by the campaign to elect Alix Moreau for president in YC128.

1037607 Nanoswarm Suspension Nanoswarm Suspension Name of item 92633 (Irregular Structure)
1037608 This device contains a nanobot swarm (or nanoswarm), suspended within a solution. They were created to support the Fabricator in its manufacturing processes.

Once primed for use, the device can be destroyed, unleashing the nanoswarm on the surrounding environment, where they will apply a specific effect. If another device is destroyed first, or they are allowed to expire, the nanoswarm will become inert.		 This device contains a nanobot swarm (or nanoswarm), suspended within a solution. They were created to support the Fabricator in its manufacturing processes.

Once primed for use, the device can be destroyed, unleashing the nanoswarm on the surrounding environment, where they will apply a specific effect. If another device is destroyed first, or they are allowed to expire, the nanoswarm will become inert.		 Description of item "Nanoswarm Suspension" (92633)
1037628 Thermal Sink Nanoswarm Thermal Sink Nanoswarm

1037637 Reflective Nanoswarm Reflective Nanoswarm
1037647 Men's Select Freedom Combat Suit Men's Select Freedom Combat Suit Name of item 92644 (Outer)
1037675 Ultratidal Entropic Disintegrator II Blueprint Ultratidal Entropic Disintegrator II Blueprint Name of item 92654 (Precursor Weapon Blueprint)
1037699 Zydrine Burn is a potent liquor that is loosely related to the more refined Zydrine Wine, both of these green-hued drinks being produced using rice leaves, a certain portion of the grains, and whatever additives are appropriate to the style of drink. While Zydrine Wine can be an extraordinarily delicate and subtle drink, with the finest generally held to be brewed from the rice plants of Intaki Prime, its more powerful cousin is a somewhat pungent and vividly green brew. Rumors suggest that some versions of Zydrine Burn use as ingredients effluent from Quafe production, liquefied fedo scent glands, or even the notorious protein delicacies in powdered form. Whatever the case, a market for this harshly memorable liquor has sprung up among space workers of all kinds, and few space station bars lack a bottle or two of the stuff. Among planetary populations the brew has a more notorious reputation, popularly considered the tipple of underclasses, criminals, and ruthless capsuleer pirates. Zydrine Burn is a potent liquor that is loosely related to the more refined Zydrine Wine, both of these green-hued drinks being produced using rice leaves, a certain portion of the grains, and whatever additives are appropriate to the style of drink. While Zydrine Wine can be an extraordinarily delicate and subtle drink, with the finest generally held to be brewed from the rice plants of Intaki Prime, its more powerful cousin is a somewhat pungent and vividly green brew. Rumors suggest that some versions of Zydrine Burn use as ingredients effluent from Quafe production, liquefied fedo scent glands, or even the notorious protein delicacies in powdered form. Whatever the case, a market for this harshly memorable liquor has sprung up among space workers of all kinds, and few space station bars lack a bottle or two of the stuff. Among planetary populations the brew has a more notorious reputation, popularly considered the tipple of underclasses, criminals, and ruthless capsuleer pirates.

Whatever the case, a market for this harshly memorable liquor has sprung up among space workers of all kinds, and few space station bars lack a bottle or two of the stuff. Among planetary populations the brew has a more notorious reputation, popularly considered the tipple of underclasses, criminals, and ruthless capsuleer pirates. Zydrine Burn is a potent liquor that is loosely related to the more refined Zydrine Wine, both of these green-hued drinks being produced using rice leaves, a certain portion of the grains, and whatever additives are appropriate to the style of drink. While Zydrine Wine can be an extraordinarily delicate and subtle drink, with the finest generally held to be brewed from the rice plants of Intaki Prime, its more powerful cousin is a somewhat pungent and vividly green brew. Rumors suggest that some versions of Zydrine Burn use as ingredients effluent from Quafe production, liquefied fedo scent glands, or even the notorious protein delicacies in powdered form. Whatever the case, a market for this harshly memorable liquor has sprung up among space workers of all kinds, and few space station bars lack a bottle or two of the stuff. Among planetary populations the brew has a more notorious reputation, popularly considered the tipple of underclasses, criminals, and ruthless capsuleer pirates.

While Zydrine Wine can be an extraordinarily delicate and subtle drink, with the finest generally held to be brewed from the rice plants of Intaki Prime, its more powerful cousin is a somewhat pungent and vividly green brew. Rumors suggest that some versions of Zydrine Burn use as ingredients effluent from Quafe production, liquefied fedo scent glands, or even the notorious protein delicacies in powdered form. Whatever the case, a market for this harshly memorable liquor has sprung up among space workers of all kinds, and few space station bars lack a bottle or two of the stuff. Among planetary populations the brew has a more notorious reputation, popularly considered the tipple of underclasses, criminals, and ruthless capsuleer pirates. 1037782 Discovery Bound Discovery Bound Name for skin material 3203
1037784 “Participation in Project Discovery is a vital reminder that the endless, war-torn expanse of New Eden is not without compassion. It is rife with empathetic pilots who understand the power of scientific research. Only through our combined efforts do we overcome the obstacles before us.”

- CONCORD Director General Panaja Paukonsuo		 “Participation in Project Discovery is a vital reminder that the endless, war-torn expanse of New Eden is not without compassion. It is rife with empathetic pilots who understand the power of scientific research. Only through our combined efforts do we overcome the obstacles before us.”

- CONCORD Director General Panaja Paukonsuo

1038323 In these violent and chaotic times, the sanctity of elections is more important than ever. As of YC128, all election officials will now be equipped with special edition Select Freedom Combat Suits developed by Duvolle Industries. These suits will ensure their ability to protect the Gallente people’s most precious asset, their votes.

- Agenbaert Goisin, Head of the Federal Administration.		 In these violent and chaotic times, the sanctity of elections is more important than ever. As of YC128, all election officials will now be equipped with special edition Select Freedom Combat Suits developed by Duvolle Industries. These suits will ensure their ability to protect the Gallente people’s most precious asset, their votes.

- Agenbaert Goisin, Head of the Federal Administration.		 Description of item "Men's Select Freedom Combat Suit" (92644)

1038592 Gallente Election YC128 Gallente Election YC128
1038628 Mystic XL Mystic XL Name of item 92952 (Advanced Exotic Plasma Charge)
1038629 An Entropic Disintegrator uses charges of exotic plasma to provide the particle feedstock for the weapon's beam, with different forms of exotic matter modulating the beam's characteristics.

An experimental exotic plasma charge developed using advanced technology in conjunction with Precursor weapons tech, the Mystic charge achieves high thermal damage potential at longer ranges than would normally be possible.

However, explosive damage remains low and there is a serious loss in the stability of the disintegrator beam. This instability reduces the tracking of weapons using Mystic Exotic Plasma charges.		 An Entropic Disintegrator uses charges of exotic plasma to provide the particle feedstock for the weapon's beam, with different forms of exotic matter modulating the beam's characteristics.

An experimental exotic plasma charge developed using advanced technology in conjunction with Precursor weapons tech, the Mystic charge achieves high thermal damage potential at longer ranges than would normally be possible.

However, explosive damage remains low and there is a serious loss in the stability of the disintegrator beam. This instability reduces the tracking of weapons using Mystic Exotic Plasma charges.		 Description of item "Mystic XL" (92952)
1038633 Occult XL Occult XL Name of item 92954 (Advanced Exotic Plasma Charge)
1038634 An Entropic Disintegrator uses charges of exotic plasma to provide the particle feedstock for the weapon's beam, with different forms of exotic matter modulating the beam's characteristics.

An experimental exotic plasma charge developed using advanced technology in conjunction with Precursor weapons tech, the Occult charge achieves heavy thermal and explosive damage potential.

This high damage comes at the expense of range and significant loss in the stability of the disintegrator beam. This instability reduces the tracking of weapons using Occult Exotic Plasma charges.		 An Entropic Disintegrator uses charges of exotic plasma to provide the particle feedstock for the weapon's beam, with different forms of exotic matter modulating the beam's characteristics.

An experimental exotic plasma charge developed using advanced technology in conjunction with Precursor weapons tech, the Occult charge achieves heavy thermal and explosive damage potential.

This high damage comes at the expense of range and significant loss in the stability of the disintegrator beam. This instability reduces the tracking of weapons using Occult Exotic Plasma charges.		 Description of item "Occult XL" (92954)

1038742 <font size="14">Gallente Election Expert System </font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly Gallente Tech 1 and Navy frigate-type, destroyer-type and cruiser-type ships along with Gallente-focused supporting skills. This is a promotional Expert System released to celebrate the Federation Day.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for four days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 <font size="14"><b>Gallente Election Expert System </b></font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly Gallente Tech 1 and Navy frigate-type, destroyer-type and cruiser-type ships along with Gallente-focused supporting skills. This is a promotional Expert System released to celebrate the Federation Day.

<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for four days.</b>

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.</i>		 Description of item "Gallente Election Expert System" (92958)
1038743 Gallente Election Expert System Gallente Election Expert System Name of item 92958 (Promotional Expert Systems)

1038748 Drones Drones UI/Inflight/SpaceComponents/ItemTrader/GroupDrones
1038774 Cryptic Ecdysis Cryptic Ecdysis Name for skin material 3204
1038779 The algorithmic output of rogue drone intelligence renders them capable of complex calculations at rates far exceeding the limitations of current augmentation technology. They have been observed swarming fleets, stripping ships of vital components, and reconfiguring them mid flight. While the phenomenon is evocative of a metal snake shedding its skin, the potential for scientific application is staggering.

- Excerpts from Alix Moreau’s research		 The algorithmic output of rogue drone intelligence renders them capable of complex calculations at rates far exceeding the limitations of current augmentation technology. They have been observed swarming fleets, stripping ships of vital components, and reconfiguring them mid flight. While the phenomenon is evocative of a metal snake shedding its skin, the potential for scientific application is staggering.

1039972 A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

1040005 Historic Carrier SKINs Crate Historic Carrier SKINs Crate Name of item 93270 (Special Edition Commodities)
1040006 This crate grants one random Carrier ship SKIN from the following SKIN lines: Dos Rouvenor's Bequest, Kairiola's Sacrifice, Caille Neon, Federal Police, Eros Blossom, Crown and Swords, Imperial Jubilee, Ironblood, Star Captain, Matigu Seabeast, Raata Sunset, Ghostbird, Freedom's Revolution, Bloody Hands, Krusual and Malagrin Marshlight.

With 16 SKINs available, each crate has a 6.25% chance to contain a specific SKIN. With 16 SKINs available, each crate has a 6.25% chance to contain a specific SKIN.		 Description of item "Historic Carrier SKINs Crate" (93270)
1040007 Historic Carrier SKINs Crate Historic Carrier SKINs Crate
1040008 This crate grants one random Carrier ship SKIN from the following SKIN lines: Dos Rouvenor's Bequest, Kairiola's Sacrifice, Caille Neon, Federal Police, Eros Blossom, Crown and Swords, Imperial Jubilee, Ironblood, Star Captain, Matigu Seabeast, Raata Sunset, Ghostbird, Freedom's Revolution, Bloody Hands, Krusual and Malagrin Marshlight.

With 16 SKINs available, each crate has a 6.25% chance to contain a specific SKIN.
